product_overview: HerbalScan is a mobile + REST API system that classifies herbal plant leaves using a ShuffleNetV2 model. The FastAPI backend accepts leaf images for inference, returns predicted class and confidence, and persists prediction records in an SQLite database.
core_goals: Provide a reliable REST API to accept leaf images and return a classification and confidence score for 16 herbal leaf classes.
Persist prediction results in a local SQLite database and expose endpoints to retrieve and delete prediction history.
Support common image formats (JPEG, PNG, WEBP) with clear handling of validation and error cases (size limit, corrupt files, unsupported types).
Enable mobile clients (Flutter) to integrate easily with simple, stateless endpoints (no authentication required in current implementation).
Maintain clear health-checking and development-friendly CORS configuration for testing and research usage.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Root endpoint to verify the backend service is running and report version information.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 500 with error message (backend unavailable)

features.name: Herbal Leaf Prediction
features.description: Upload a leaf image (JPEG/PNG/WEBP) to /predict to receive a predicted herbal leaf class and a confidence score; the server stores the prediction in the SQLite database and returns the record id.
user_flows: POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=leaf.jpg (image/jpeg, size 1.2MB) -> Receive 200 with JSON {"id": <integer>, "predicted_class": "Basil - healthy", "confidence_score": 0.9123}
POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=leaf.png (image/png, size 800KB) -> Receive 200 with JSON {"id": <integer>, "predicted_class": "Jahe - rusak", "confidence_score": 0.7541}
POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=leaf.webp (image/webp, size 600KB) -> Receive 200 with JSON {"id": <integer>, "predicted_class": "Kelor - healthy", "confidence_score": 0.8437}

POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=leaf.jpg (image/jpeg, size 900KB) -> Receive 200 with JSON {"id": 42, "predicted_class": "Kemangi - rusak", "confidence_score": 0.6789} -> GET /history -> Receive 200 with array including record where id = 42
POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=notes.txt (text/plain) -> Receive 415 Unsupported Media Type
POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=huge.jpg (image/jpeg, size 12MB) -> Receive 413 Payload Too Large
POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=corrupt.jpg (image/jpeg, unreadable bytes) -> Receive 400 Invalid image file (corrupt or unreadable)
POST /predict without 'file' field -> Receive 422 Validation Error (missing file field)

features.name: Prediction History
features.description: Retrieve all stored prediction records from the backend SQLite database. Each record contains id, image_path, predicted_class, confidence_score, and timestamp.
user_flows: GET /history -> Receive 200 with an array of prediction objects [{"id":1,"image_path":"uploads/1.jpg","predicted_class":"Kemangi - healthy","confidence_score":0.9123,"timestamp":"2026-04-23T12:00:00Z"}, ...]
GET /history -> Receive 200 with an empty array [] (no predictions yet)
POST /predict with multipart/form-data field 'file'=leaf.jpg (image/jpeg) -> Receive 200 with JSON {"id": 99, ...} -> GET /history -> Receive 200 with array that includes object with "id": 99
GET /history -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error (database unavailable)

features.name: Delete Prediction
features.description: Delete a specific prediction record by its ID from the SQLite database via the DELETE /history/{prediction_id} endpoint.
user_flows: DELETE /history/42 -> Receive 200 with {"message":"Data berhasil dihapus."} -> GET /history -> Receive 200 with array not containing record with id = 42
DELETE /history/9999 -> Receive 404 with detail "Data tidak ditemukan."

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Root endpoint to verify the backend is running

features.name: Herbal Leaf Prediction
features.description: Upload a leaf image and receive classification result from ShuffleNetV2 model

endpoints.description: Upload image file (JPEG/PNG/WEBP) and get predicted herbal leaf class with confidence score

body.file: binary (multipart/form-data, image/jpeg or image/png or image/webp, max 10MB)

features.name: Prediction History
features.description: Retrieve all stored prediction records from SQLite database

endpoints.description: Returns all prediction records saved in the database

features.name: Delete Prediction
features.description: Delete a specific prediction record by its ID

endpoints.description: Delete a prediction record by ID

known_limitations.issue: No authentication or API key protection on any endpoint
known_limitations.impact: Any client can access predict and delete endpoints without authorization
Suitable for development/research, but not production-safe

known_limitations.issue: Model loaded at inference time, no warm-up endpoint
known_limitations.impact: First prediction request may be slower due to model loading
